hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [[ -z "$f" || ! -f "$f" || "$f" != *.py ]] && exit 0; out=$(python -m py_compile "$f" 2>&1); if [[ -n "$out" ]]; then msg=$(printf 'SYNTAX ERROR in %s: %s' "$f" "$out"); jq -n --arg ctx "$msg" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":$ctx}}'; else echo "✓ syntax OK: $f"; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [[ -z "$f" || ! -f "$f" || "$f" != *.py ]] && exit 0; out=$(ruff check "$f" 2>&1); if [[ -n "$out" ]]; then msg=$(printf 'RUFF in %s: %s' "$f" "$out"); jq -n --arg ctx "$msg" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":$ctx}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [[ -z "$f" || ! -f "$f" || "$f" != *.py ]] && exit 0; out=$(mypy "$f" --ignore-missing-imports --no-error-summary 2>&1 | grep ': error:'); if [[ -n "$out" ]]; then msg=$(printf 'MYPY in %s: %s' "$f" "$out"); jq -n --arg ctx "$msg" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":$ctx}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [[ -z "$f" || ! -f "$f" ]] && exit 0; hits=$(grep -nE '(ALPACA_API_KEY|ALPACA_SECRET_KEY|aws_access_key_id|aws_secret_access_key)[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*[A-Za-z0-9/+]{10,}' "$f" 2>/dev/null); aws_hits=$(grep -nE 'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}' "$f" 2>/dev/null); combined=$(printf '%s\n%s' "$hits" "$aws_hits" | sed '/^$/d'); if [[ -n "$combined" ]]; then msg=$(printf 'SECRET LEAK in %s: %s' "$f" "$combined"); jq -n --arg ctx "$msg" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":$ctx}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [[ -z "$f" || ! -f "$f" || "$f" != *.json ]] && exit 0; python -m json.tool "$f" > /dev/null 2>&1 || { jq -n --arg ctx "INVALID JSON: $f" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":$ctx}}'; }; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [[ -z "$f" || ! -f "$f" || "$f" != *.py ]] && exit 0; hits=$(grep -nE '#\s*(TODO|FIXME|HACK|XXX|BUG|TEMP)\b' "$f" 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$hits" ]]; then msg=$(printf 'Debug markers in %s (FYI): %s' "$f" "$hits"); jq -n --arg ctx "$msg" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":$ctx}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *requirements*.txt ]] && jq -n '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"requirements.txt changed — run: pip install -r requirements.txt"}}'; } 2>/dev/null || true

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null); echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] $cmd" >> ~/.alphadesk/claude_bash_log.txt 2>/dev/null; echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^\s*(rm\s+-[rRf]*f[rRf]*\s+/|git\s+push\s+--force\s+origin\s+(main|master)|DROP\s+TABLE|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE)' && echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Dangerous command blocked — confirm manually before proceeding."}' || true

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git\s+(commit|add)' || exit 0; staged=$(git -C /Users/vignesh/GitHub/Projects/2026-04-April/Stock-trading-agent diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^\.env'); if [[ -n "$staged" ]]; then jq -n --arg ctx "BLOCKED: .env staged for commit: $staged — remove with: git restore --staged .env" '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Refusing to commit .env — secrets exposed in git history.","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":$ctx}}'; fi

ts=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'); summary=$(git -C /Users/vignesh/GitHub/Projects/2026-04-April/Stock-trading-agent diff --stat HEAD 2>/dev/null | tail -1); echo "[$ts] Session ended. Changes: ${summary:-none}" >> ~/.alphadesk/claude_sessions.log 2>/dev/null; true
